translation_en: His complete works from over the years were on display at the conference, by which time he was already a prolific writer.
translation_zh: 他多年来的全部作品在会议上展出，到那时他已经著作等身了。

sentence: 领导者专横跋扈，就得不到群众的信任和支持
translation_en: A leader who is domineering and tyrannical will not earn the trust and support of the people.
translation_zh: 专横跋扈的领导者不会赢得人民的信任和支持。

sentence: 不由我不专心致志搞这一套
translation_en: I won't focus on this unless I have to.
translation_zh: 除非必须，否则我不会专心致志。

sentence: 转瞬之间，从曲折的山路有一队奔跑的马蹄声迎面而来
translation_en: In the blink of an eye, the sound of galloping hooves came rushing towards us from the winding mountain path.
translation_zh: 转瞬之间，马蹄声从蜿蜒的山路上奔腾而来。

sentence: 经医务人员的全力抢救，这名危重病人已经转危为安
translation_en: Thanks to the medical staff's all-out efforts, the critically ill patient has stabilized.
translation_zh: 多亏医护人员的全力以赴，危重病人已转危为安。

sentence: 你欠了我的，你得还。我一直没说过，你不能再装聋卖傻
translation_en: You owe me, you have to pay it back. I haven't said anything before, but you can't keep pretending you don't know.
translation_zh: 你欠我的，必须还我，虽然之前我没有说什么，但不能一直装聋卖傻。

sentence: 这些感情炽烈的诗篇，抒发了作者壮志未酬的愤懑之情
translation_en: These passionate poems express the author's unfulfilled ambition and resentment.
translation_zh: 这些充满激情的诗歌表达了作者的壮志未酬之情和不满。

sentence: 学习上追根究底的精神，是非常可贵的
translation_en: The spirit of pursuing the root cause in learning is very valuable.
translation_zh: 学习中追求追根究底的精神非常宝贵。

sentence: 父亲，您生前谆谆教导我们，不要那种脱离人民的虚无主义、个人主义
translation_en: Father, you always taught us before you passed away to avoid that kind of empty and selfish ideology that is detached from the people.
translation_zh: 父亲临终前，谆谆教导我们远离脱离人民群众的空洞自私思想。

sentence: 我们要奋发地工作，卓有成效地完成上级交给我们的任务
translation_en: We will work hard and accomplish our tasks effectively.
translation_zh: 我们将努力工作，卓有成效地完成任务。

sentence: 看到下一代健康活泼地茁壮成长，为人父母者无不感到十分欣慰
translation_en: Parents can't help but feel deeply pleased to see their children grow up healthy and lively.
translation_zh: 看着孩子健康活泼地茁壮成长，父母心中别提多高兴了。

sentence: 吃饭一拿起饭碗，就龇牙裂嘴装鬼脸说怎么净吃小米，还不敌猪食。人家那边一天两顿面，我还嫌不合口味
translation_en: As soon as I picked up my rice bowl, I grinned and made a scary face, saying how I only ever ate millet and it wasn't even as good as pig feed.  People over there eat noodles twice a day, and I still find it unpalatable.
translation_zh: 我一拿起饭碗就露出了龇牙裂嘴的表情，说自己只吃小米，连猪食都不如。

sentence: 读书人悲观失望，自暴自弃；可是那些工人却多么坚强呵，多么勇敢呵
translation_en: Scholars are pessimistic and despairing, giving up on themselves; but those workers are so strong and brave.
translation_zh: 学者们陷入自暴自弃，对自身失去信心，而那些工人却异常坚强勇敢。

sentence: 散居世界各国的华侨，虽然不少已入外国籍，但其对祖国的忠诚仍是自不待言的
translation_en: Overseas Chinese living around the world, although many have become citizens of other countries, their loyalty to their homeland remains unquestionable.
translation_zh: 海外华侨虽然许多已成为其他国家的公民，但对故土的忠诚自不待言。

sentence: 她自惭形秽般只呆在一个黑暗的角落里，不敢发一言
translation_en: She stood shamefaced in a dark corner, too embarrassed to speak.
translation_zh: 她站在黑暗的角落里，羞愧难当，自惭形秽。

sentence: 我们要自觉自愿地维护国家和民族的利益
translation_en: We should consciously and voluntarily safeguard the interests of our country and nation.
translation_zh: 我们应该自觉自愿地维护国家的利益。

sentence: 后来的史官更是自郐以下了
translation_en: Later historians even downgraded his status further.
translation_zh: 后来的历史学家甚至将他地位降到了自郐以下。

sentence: 有人说中国的实业就会借此促进，那是自欺欺人之谈
translation_en: To say that China's manufacturing industry will benefit from this is self-deception.
translation_zh: 说中国制造业会从中受益，简直是自欺欺人。

sentence: 一个国家要想强盛，必须要有自强不息的精神
translation_en: A nation must have a spirit of self-reliance and perseverance to become strong.
translation_zh: 一个国家想要强大，必须要有自强不息的精神。

sentence: 玩火者只会自食其果
translation_en: Those who play with fire will get burned.
translation_zh: 玩火者必自食其果。

sentence: 我么？你问我么？我是自私自利的个人主义者
translation_en: Me? You're asking me? I'm a selfish egotist.
translation_zh: 你问我？我可是个十足的自私自利的人。

sentence: 他本身是报纸编辑，因此每作新诗词必在报纸上自我吹嘘，俨然以当代文豪自居
translation_en: He was a newspaper editor by profession, so he would always boast about his new poems and verses in the paper, acting as if he were a contemporary literary master.
translation_zh: 他是一位报纸编辑，因此总是自我吹嘘自己新写的诗歌和文章会在报上发表。

sentence: 这些理论自相矛盾
translation_en: These theories contradict each other.
translation_zh: 这些理论自相矛盾。

sentence: 做事不能自行其是，最好听听别人的意见
translation_en: One shouldn't act unilaterally; it's best to listen to others' opinions.
translation_zh: 一个人不要自作主张，最好听取他人的意见，切莫自行其是。

sentence: 一个严于解剖自己的人，往往是有自知之明的
translation_en: Someone who is hard on themselves when analyzing their own flaws often has self-awareness.
translation_zh: 过于苛求自己分析自身缺陷的人往往拥有自知之明。

sentence: 察其原因，不外有少数顽固分子，不顾民族国家利益，恣意妄为
translation_en: The reason for this is that there are only a few diehard elements who disregard national and ethnic interests and act recklessly.
translation_zh: 原因是只有极少数恣意妄为，不顾国家和民族利益的人。

sentence: 我国是一个多山之国，山脉纵横交错
translation_en: My country is a mountainous country, with mountain ranges running crisscross.
translation_zh: 我的国家是一个多山国，山脉纵横交错。

sentence: 你看他那种走马上任的神气，你就可以知道他是一位全然不懂教育的外行乃至老腐败
translation_en: Just look at how he struts around, acting like he's already in charge. You can tell he's completely clueless about education, an outsider, even a corrupt old relic.
translation_zh: 看看他趾高气扬的样子，仿佛已经走马上任了，却对教育一窍不通，是个外行，甚至像个腐朽的老人。

sentence: 他感到，内心的一些想法摆到桌面上是站不住脚的，还是走为上策
translation_en: He felt that some of his inner thoughts, laid out on the table, were unconvincing and that it was best to retreat.
translation_zh: 他觉得把内心的一些想法摊开来说，并不令人信服，只好选择走为上策。

sentence: 按照现在的用水量，我们的存水用到目的港是足足有余的
translation_en: Based on our current water usage, we have more than enough water to reach our destination port.
translation_zh: 根据目前的用水量，我们足足有余可以到达目的地港口。

sentence: 这场空难事故的罪魁祸首竟然是一只在机场上空飞翔的鸽子
translation_en: The culprit behind this air disaster was surprisingly a pigeon flying over the airport.
translation_zh: 这场空难的罪魁祸首竟是一只飞越机场的鸽子。

sentence: 请问您的尊姓大名
translation_en: May I ask for your name?
translation_zh: 请问您的尊姓大名？

sentence: 照顾‘左邻右舍’，不能搞先进迁就落后，不能搞平均主义
translation_en: Look after your neighbors, but don't cater to the backward at the expense of the advanced, nor should you pursue mediocrity.
translation_zh: 要照顾左邻右舍，但不要为了照顾落后而牺牲先进，更不应该追求平庸。

sentence: 这件事真叫他左右两难
translation_en: This matter truly puts him in a difficult position.
translation_zh: 这件事让他陷入左右两难。

sentence: 我们需要制定必要的规章制度，但不可过于繁琐，弄得作茧自缚，捆住自己的手脚
translation_en: We need to establish necessary rules and regulations, but they shouldn't be overly complicated, to the point where they become self-defeating and restrict our own actions.
translation_zh: 我们需要制定必要的规则和规定，但不能过于复杂，以免 作茧自缚 ，限制自身行动。

sentence: 有些人只会坐而论道，而不办实事
translation_en: Some people only talk about things without taking action.
translation_zh: 有些人只会坐而论道，却不去行动。

sentence: 我看他们实在是坐失机宜，让敌人多准备了一天一夜
translation_en: They really missed an opportunity, giving the enemy a whole day and night to prepare.
translation_zh: 他们错过了良机，让敌人整整一天一夜的时间准备，真是坐失机宜。

sentence: 别人有困难时，我们要热心帮助，决不能坐视不救
translation_en: When others are in trouble, we should help them wholeheartedly and never stand idly by.
translation_zh: 遇到别人困难的时候，我们应该 wholeheartedly 帮助他们，绝不能坐视不救。

sentence: 从早到晚，长椅上都是坐无虚席
translation_en: The benches were always full from morning till night.
translation_zh: 从早到晚，这些长椅总是坐无虚席。

sentence: 哪里有压迫，哪里就有反抗。人民大众不会坐以待毙
translation_en: Where there is oppression, there is resistance.  The people will not passively wait for their fate.
translation_zh: 压迫存在的地方，反抗就会出现，人民不会坐以待毙。
